strategy: Hit with Ice (+40%); the Golem resists Fire 70%.
Kill the Chief Whip early — it Spirit Armors whatever you attack (eating your hits), Rebirths fallen enemies, and Entangles you when you heal.
Gas Elementals keep recycling until the Golem itself is dead, so don't chase adds — focus the Golem and Chief Whip.
Expect a -45% Smoke Screen every 4th round; use accuracy enchants or heal off the fizzles.
Blade up and AoE Ice to hit the Golem, Chief Whip, and Elementals together.
cheatNotes: Round 2 two Gas Elementals join and go active round 3.
When an Elemental hits 50% health he Take-Powers them and cycles in fresh Elementals endlessly until the Golem is dead — kill the Golem, don't chase adds.
Every 4th round the Golem casts a -45% Smoke Screen — bring accuracy.
When you cast a damage spell the Chief Whip may Spirit Armor your target, absorbing the hit — kill the Whip to stop this.
On a multi-target hit the Spirit Armor lands on the first spot.
The Chief Whip can Rebirth to revive fallen enemies.
Heal and the Chief Whip Entangles you — another reason to drop it first.
Pet-cast heals trigger the Entangle too.
